No appearance, Tentative Ruling Adopted: laintiff's motion to compel further responses to deposition questions is denied in part and granted in part. Plaintiff's motion for an order excluding evidence at trial is denied. The subject matter of the motion is the subject of a motion in limine. The Court makes no rulings as to the merits, if any, of such a motion. Commissioner: Bruce E. Chan.
